summary: Iteration 4: Backend testing completed for Promotions CRUD and Service Photos CRUD. All 37 tests passed. Full CRUD operations tested: create, read, update, delete, toggle is_active for promotions. Photo upload/delete flow working correctly. Auth validation working for all protected endpoints.

test_credentials.note: Fresh session token created for each test run

seed_data_creation: Test promotions and photos created and cleaned up during tests (prefixed with TEST_PROMO_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 4 are working correctly. Tested: Promotions CRUD (GET /api/promotions/ public, GET /api/promotions/all auth, POST /api/promotions/ auth, PUT /api/promotions/{id} auth, DELETE /api/promotions/{id} auth). Service Photos CRUD (GET /api/service-photos/{service_id} public, POST /api/service-photos/ auth, DELETE /api/service-photos/{photo_id} auth). Auth validation works correctly - all write operations require barber authentication. Toggle is_active on promotions correctly shows/hides from public list.

tested_features.promotions_list_public: PASS - GET /api/promotions/ returns active promotions (public, no auth)
tested_features.promotions_all_with_auth: PASS - GET /api/promotions/all returns barber's promotions with auth
tested_features.promotions_create_full: PASS - POST /api/promotions/ creates promotion with title, description, discount_percent, code, valid_until
tested_features.promotions_create_minimal: PASS - POST /api/promotions/ creates promotion with title only (optional fields)
tested_features.promotions_update_persisted: PASS - Updates correctly persisted in database
tested_features.promotions_toggle_inactive: PASS - PUT /api/promotions/{id} with is_active=false hides from public list
tested_features.promotions_toggle_active: PASS - PUT /api/promotions/{id} with is_active=true shows in public list
tested_features.photos_list_public: PASS - GET /api/service-photos/{service_id} returns photos (public, no auth)
tested_features.photos_upload_with_caption: PASS - POST /api/service-photos/ uploads photo with base64 data and caption
tested_features.photos_upload_no_caption: PASS - POST /api/service-photos/ uploads photo without caption (optional)
tested_features.photos_verify_in_list: PASS - Uploaded photo appears in service photos list
tested_features.full_promotion_flow: PASS - create -> list all -> update -> toggle inactive -> list public -> delete
tested_features.full_photo_flow: PASS - upload -> list -> delete -> verify removed

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED - will fail gracefully without real Meta API credentials
